description: Compact metrics expected from an audio-mix proof contract.

fields.ok: Boolean verdict for the render operation itself.
fields.proofKind: Stable receipt kind, usually offline-audio-metrics or offline-audio-window-set.
fields.summary.total: Optional mix score summary when the app has a scoring model.
fields.mixHealth.rms: Rendered mix root-mean-square level for the proof window.
fields.mixHealth.peak: Rendered mix peak amplitude; values >= 0.98 are treated as clipping risk by default.
fields.monitorMetrics: Optional translated-listening monitor, such as smallSpeaker.
fields.sectionEnergyComparison.version: Stable comparison receipt version, currently riddle-proof.audio-section-heuristics.v1.
fields.sectionEnergyComparison.role: Must be metric_supported_review_order; this is a review aid, not a taste score.
fields.sectionEnergyComparison.sections[].basel: Per-section baseline RMS, peak, total energy, loudness-style estimate, headroom, clipping, and low-level flags.
fields.sectionEnergyComparison.sections[].candi: Per-section candidate RMS, peak, total energy, loudness-style estimate, headroom, clipping, and low-level flags.
fields.sectionEnergyComparison.sections[].delta: Candidate minus baseline deltas for RMS, peak, total energy, loudness-style estimate, and headroom.
fields.sectionEnergyComparison.sections[].track: Optional requested/focused instrument energy movement for each section.
fields.sectionEnergyComparison.sections[].requi: Boolean guardrail for required active instruments in that section.
fields.sectionEnergyComparison.requiredSectionE: Boolean summary for required active instrument floors across sections.
fields.sectionEnergyComparison.guardrailsPreser: Boolean summary for clipping, headroom, and low-level guardrails.
fields.sectionEnergyComparison.boundary: Proof/taste boundary statement for the heuristic receipt.
fields.loudnessConsequenceComparison.version: Stable loudness consequence receipt version, currently riddle-proof.audio-mix-loudness-consequence.v1.
fields.loudnessConsequenceComparison.loudnessMe: Metric name. Use rms_loudness_style_lufs_proxy unless a standards-compliant LUFS implementation is actually used.
fields.loudnessConsequenceComparison.standardsC: False for the current RMS-derived loudness-style proxy.
fields.loudnessConsequenceComparison.sections[]: Baseline section loudness value for the proof window.
Candidate section loudness value for the proof window.
Intent-aware expected delta range derived from request magnitude, direction, or explicit configuration.
fields.loudnessConsequenceComparison.reviewWarn: Count of sections whose loudness shift should be reviewed. This is a review signal, not a taste score.
fields.reviewWarnings[].kind: For loudness consequence warnings, use loudness_consequence_requires_review.
fields.reviewWarnings[].boundary: Proof/taste boundary statement. Loudness warnings do not prove subjective mix quality.

classification.product_regression: The app rendered objective audio evidence that violates the stated claim.
classification.proof_insufficient: The proof could not support the claim because a receipt was missing or too coarse.
classification.profile_calibration: The profile chose the wrong window, threshold, fixture, or viewport.
classification.app_contract_gap: The app needs a smaller or more stable proof contract surface.
classification.runtime_environment_blocked: The browser or preview runtime could not produce valid evidence.
classification.needs_human_review: The metrics are real, but the remaining question is subjective listening judgment.
